description: The SAP Business One Production & MRP connector provides APIs for the production and MRP objects of SAP Business One: bills of materials, production orders, resources, and forecasts, exposed through the [SAP Business One Service Layer](https://help.sap.com/doc/056f69366b5345a386bb8149f1700c19/10.0/en-US/Service%20Layer%20API%20Reference.html) (OData).
key-features: Create, release, and close production orders
Maintain resources, capacities, and routing stages
